subject: keycap-cluster
notes: GMK CYL Selene moon-goddess theme; dusty rose splash for the silvery moonlit palette; Cherry-profile cluster 4–5 caps
source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
composition: Five Cherry-profile keycaps: back row — wide 1.5u Shift modifier (left) + 1u alpha (right); front row — 1.25u modifier (left), 1u focal alpha with crescent glyph (center), 1u alpha (right). Asymmetric split mirrors a casually tipped keycap tray. Focal alpha carries a dusty rose fill and a waxing crescent moon glyph in the inset dish, evoking the Selene moon-goddess theme without leaning on literal astronomy iconography. Bronze theme dot (upper-right) and rose accent pip (lower-right) provide the two color anchors per the single-splash convention.
